output: T6 verified. `npx tsc --noEmit` passed, the discovered `ai-timeline-agent` test modules passed, `npm run test:edge:smoke` passed, the harness file was updated to cover the 5 new generation paths with corrected payload assertions, and a temporary runtime repro script confirmed the new routing/model/lineage behavior. The full edge unit suite still has unrelated failures outside this change surface, and the full harness run is blocked here by external Supabase DNS/network access.

The full harness script cannot complete in this sandbox because external Supabase sign-in fails before agent execution with `getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND ...supabase.co`.

Scoped status/diff confirms no changes under `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/`; within the relevant paths, the 4 tracked agent files plus the updated harness are in scope, and `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/tools/create-task.ts` appears as an untracked agent-side file in this worktree.

task_updates.executor_notes: `npx tsc --noEmit` passed on the final tree. The discovered `supabase/functions/ai-timeline-agent/**/*.test.*` modules all passed when run as full files: `command-parser.test.ts`, `selectedClips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`, and `tools/clips.test.ts` passed 18/18 tests. `npm run test:edge:smoke` also passed with 104 passing smoke tests and 8 skipped. I updated `supabase/functions/_tests/harness/diverse-gen-test.ts` so it covers the 5 newly added generation paths plus the new model-selection cases, and corrected its assertions to match the resolver-facing payload keys (`model_name`, `image_url`, `generation_id`, `based_on`). Running the full harness module after that update is blocked in this sandbox before agent execution because Supabase test-user sign-in cannot resolve the external hostname (`getaddrinfo ENOTFOUND ...supabase.co`). To verify the bug fix without network access, I created and ran a short temporary runtime repro script against `createGenerationTask` with stubbed `fetch` and `Deno.env`; it passed for `text-to-image` with `z-image`, `image-to-video` with `ltx-2.3`, and the 5 new task types, confirming correct family routing, model-name mapping, lineage fields (`based_on` / `generation_id`), and `character-animate` default `resolution=480p`. Scoped status/diff confirms no edits under `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Partially. TypeScript compiles cleanly, the targeted ai-timeline-agent tests pass, the edge smoke suite passes, and scoped git status/diff confirms no resolver edits with only the expected agent paths plus the harness in scope. The full existing edge unit suite does not fully pass in this worktree because of unrelated failures outside the ai-timeline-agent change surface, and the networked harness run is blocked by sandbox DNS.
